result.stdout:
A cli tool for interacting with a Tus enabled server.

Usage: tus [arguments] [options]

Arguments:
  address          The endpoint of the Tus server
  file             File to upload

Options:
  -m|--metadata    Additional metadata to submit. Can be specified multiple times. Format: key=value
  -c|--chunk-size  The size (in MB) of each chunk when uploading. Default: 5
  -h|--header      Specify additional HTTP header to send. Can be specified multiple times. Format: Header-Name=HeaderValue
  -?|-h|--help     Show help information

commands.payload:
A cli tool for interacting with a Tus enabled server.

Usage: tus [arguments] [options]

Arguments:
  address          The endpoint of the Tus server
  file             File to upload

Options:
  -m|--metadata    Additional metadata to submit. Can be specified multiple times. Format: key=value
  -c|--chunk-size  The size (in MB) of each chunk when uploading. Default: 5
  -h|--header      Specify additional HTTP header to send. Can be specified multiple times. Format: Header-Name=HeaderValue
  -?|-h|--help     Show help information

staticCommands.name: tus
staticCommands.description: A cli tool for interacting with a Tus enabled server.
